Purpose: To contribute to designing, developing, and optimizing secure and scalable software solutions while gaining hands-on experience in end-to-end product development.

skills.label: CS Fundamentals
skills.details: Data Structures and Algorithms, Operating Systems, Computer Networking, Database Management System

skills.label: Frameworks & Libraries
skills.details: Next.js, React, Drizzle ORM, Clerk, Zustand, React Query, Tailwind CSS

skills.label: Tools & Concepts
skills.details: Multithreading, Socket Programming, Docker, Event-Driven Architecture, Caching, Protocol Design, Git, PWA Development

projects.name: **[AlgoVerse - Data Structure Visualisation](https://github.com/Raqibreyaz/AlgoVerse)** | JavaScript, React.js
projects.summary: A JavaScript visualization library supporting 5 core data structures (Graph, Heap, LinkedList, Stack, Queue).
highlights: Achieved **100+ npm downloads within 24 hours** of release, demonstrating strong developer adoption.

projects.name: **[Synclet - Delta-based File Synchronization Tool](https://github.com/Raqibreyaz/Synclet)** | C++, Epoll, Inotify, TCP Sockets, Content-Defined Chunking
projects.summary: An event-driven peer-to-peer file sync engine with delta synchronization and optimized network transfers.
highlights: Built an **event-driven file syncing engine** handling **10k+ files** using **inotify + epoll**, reducing **CPU usage by ~80%**.
Optimized network transfers with **content-defined chunking**, syncing only modified chunks and reducing **bandwidth usage by ~70%**.
Implemented **snapshot versioning**, **smart rename detection**, and **binary-safe transfers**, enabling **100% reliable two-way sync** across peers.

projects.name: **[ProxyRaQ - Multithreaded HTTP/HTTPS Proxy Server](https://github.com/Raqibreyaz/ProxyRaQ)** | C, TCP Sockets, Thread Pool, LRU Caching
projects.summary: A high-performance HTTP/HTTPS proxy server built in pure C with caching, site blocking, and SSL/TLS support.
highlights: Developed a **multithreaded HTTP/HTTPS proxy server** in **pure C** with **caching**, **site blocking**, and **SSL/TLS**, featuring modular architecture.
Achieved **~2,200 requests/sec throughput** under **1,000 concurrent clients**, maintaining **0% failures** and demonstrating high concurrency reliability.
Optimized **LRU caching** (in-memory + disk), socket backlog, and thread pool scheduling, ensuring **low-latency handling (~44-460 ms)** across varying loads.
Containerized with **Docker** for reproducible deployments and scalability testing.

projects.name: **[Finance Manager - Personal Finance Tracking PWA](https://github.com/Raqibreyaz/Finance-Manager)** | Next.js, PostgreSQL, Drizzle ORM, React Query
projects.summary: A full-stack progressive web app for tracking income, expenses, and savings with real-time analytics and multi-account support.
highlights: Built a **modern finance tracking PWA** visualizing **income, expenses, and savings** across **multiple accounts** with **real-time analytics**.
Reduced redundant database queries by **~40%** using **Drizzle ORM** and indexed **PostgreSQL tables**, enabling **type-safe multi-account** transaction tracking.
Improved **UI responsiveness by ~50%** through **React Query caching** and **Zustand state management**, with **Zod validation** ensuring **100% data integrity**.

projects.name: **[Banaras Mart - Full-Stack E-Commerce Platform](https://github.com/Raqibreyaz/Banaras-Mart)** | Node.js, React.js, Express.js, MongoDB, TailwindCSS
projects.summary: A role-based multi-vendor e-commerce platform with secure JWT authentication, product management, and Razorpay payment integration.
highlights: Developed a **role-based multi-vendor e-commerce platform** with **secure JWT auth**, **product management**, and **Razorpay payments**, supporting **100+ products** and **3 user roles** (Admin/Seller/Customer).
Achieved **~45% faster page responses** and **>90% lower redundant API calls** using **modular Express.js controllers** and **Redux Toolkit Query caching**.
Ensured **100% transaction integrity** and **encrypted sessions** via **JWT + bcryptjs**; integrated **Cloudinary CDN** for **~5x faster image delivery** and responsive UX.

projects.name: **[Mind Map Builder - Interactive Workflow Visualization Tool](https://github.com/Raqibreyaz/Mind-Map-Builder)** | React.js, React-Flow, Zustand
projects.summary: An interactive flow-based editor enabling real-time node creation, connection, and manipulation with undo/redo support.
highlights: Built an **interactive flow-based editor** enabling users to create and connect **50+ nodes** with **real-time drag-and-drop** and **auto-connect edges** using **@xyflow/react**.
Optimized global state management with **Zustand's selector-based subscriptions**, reducing unnecessary component **re-renders by ~60%** and improving UI responsiveness.
Implemented **undo/redo stack** with efficient **snapshot tracking**, cutting **history memory usage by ~40%** and ensuring smooth actions under **high interaction frequency**.

projects.name: **[CipherForge - File Encryption/Decryption Tool](https://github.com/Raqibreyaz/CipherForge)** | C++, Smart Pointers, Thread Pool
projects.summary: A multi-threaded file encryption utility with optimized memory management and high performance.
highlights: Engineered a **multi-threaded file encryption utility** encrypting **1,000+ files 4.2x faster** than sequential execution using **custom thread pool** and **load-balanced task distribution**.
Optimized memory management with **smart pointers** (unique_ptr, shared_ptr), eliminating memory leaks and maintaining **stability across 500+ concurrent operations**.
Achieved **\<10 MB peak memory usage** and ensured **100% successful encryption/decryption** of all files within **large directories (\>1 GB total data)**.

Achievements.bullet: **300+ problems** solved, demonstrating strong problem-solving skills
**60+ repositories** including backend, frontend, and full-stack projects; contributions visible publicly.
